name: Smothered Round Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the roast with half of the salt and peppers.
2. Dust the roast with flour on all sides.
3. Heat the oil in a Dutch oven or other large heavy pot over medium-high heat.
4. Add the steak to the hot oil and brown well on all sides.
5. Remove the meat and set aside, leaving 1 teaspoon of oil in the pan.
6. Add half the onions, bell peppers, celery, and the remaining seasonings.
7. Stir well and reduce the heat to the lowest possible point.
8. Return the roast to the pot and cover with the remaining vegetables.
9. Cover and let cook until the meat is very tender, about 1 hour and 15 minutes.
10. Serve the meat in slices, with rice alongside and the gravy over all.
When you try this recipe with other kinds of meat, be sure to adjust the cooking times accordingly—let tenderness be your guide. For extra flavorful roasts, try larding with slivers of garlic before smothering. Serves 4-6.
